calendar.matters:
Notice To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-15-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The cause comes on regular calendar this day for Motion to set aside default and default judgment. Plaintiff represented by Baron Drexel, Esq and Dolores Chong, Esq. for moving party. Following voir dire by the court and good cause appearing, therefore; the court orders entry of defualt and default judgment set aside. The answer is to be filed within five court days. The correct spelling of defendant's last name is Mansour.

Motion To Set Aside Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-15-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The cause comes on regular calendar this day for Motion to set aside default and default judgment. Plaintiff represented by Baron Drexel, Esq and Dolores Chong, Esq. for moving party. Following voir dire by the court and good cause appearing, therefore; the court orders entry of defualt and default judgment set aside. The answer is to be filed within five court days. The correct spelling of defendant's last name is Mansour.
